title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **Old Ones Origins**
*2028*
Become one of the eldritch gods and wage war at the dawn of time.
![Old Ones Origins](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_3254a3e7.png)

2. **Forbidden Stars**
*2015*
Assemble your armies, devise your strategy, and wage war across the Herakon Cluster.
![Forbidden Stars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_91ec1c9d.jpg)

3. **Rebirth**
*2024*
Rebuild old lands in a lush, hopeful future.
![Rebirth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_7d938729.png)

4. **The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers – Ascension**
*2027*
Resist the Ring and forge your fellowship in an epic Middle-earth struggle for power.
![The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers – Ascension](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_8fce2182.png)

5. **Tigris & Euphrates**
*1997*
Keep your Mesopotamian civilization in perfect balance through revolutions and wars.
![Tigris & Euphrates](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_4bf92354.png)

6. **The Game Makers**
*2026*
Follow your dreams and manufacture the greatest board games of all time.
![The Game Makers](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_d8670982.jpg)

7. **The Resort**
*2027*
Manage a resort in paradise while making your guests happy.
![The Resort](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_f912b7a9.jpg)

8. **Container**
*2026*
Set prices as you produce, sell, and ship containers in a tight economic simulation.
![Container](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_ba4f16f2.jpg)

9. **Magical Athlete**
*2025*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_d8cbb12c.png)

10. **Wingspan Pocket**
*2026*
Swiftly build and activate a row of colorful birds.
![Wingspan Pocket](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_7a8f7b70.jpg)

11. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_425d737e.png)

12. **Duel of Meloch**
*2026*
Scythe vs Expeditions: Clash head-to-head on a tight map in a race to victory.
![Duel of Meloch](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_4d1ee13b.png)

13. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*2024*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_3c1f780e.jpg)

14. **The Old King's Crown**
*2025*
Out-manoeuvre your rivals as you vie for control of an ancient, crumbling kingdom.
![The Old King's Crown](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_5b7d0568.jpg)

15. **-60°**
*2026*
Lead an expedition to the meteorite impact site.
![-60°](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_09dfd854.png)

16. **Star Trek: Captain's Chair**
*2025*
Step into the shoes of an iconic Star Trek captain and explore the galaxy!
![Star Trek: Captain's Chair](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_5f5e9432.jpg)

17. **Ark Nova**
*2021*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_22e74cd1.jpg)

18. **Kingdom Come: Deliverance – The Board Game**
*2026*
Develop your character, fulfill quests, and shape history in 15th-century Bohemia.
![Kingdom Come: Deliverance – The Board Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_0f11de4f.png)

19. **World Order**
*2026*
Simulate the modern global political system in this area-majority game.
![World Order](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_54ad3b4a.jpg)

20. **Harmonies**
*2024*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_0a54367b.jpg)

21. **Wolfmoon**
*2026*
Use the card effects to eliminate all your competition.
![Wolfmoon](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_06d348cc.jpg)

22. **YRO**
*2024*
Build a party of chibi adventurers in a 3 x 3 grid in this quick combo engine builder
![YRO](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_ef74082c.png)

23. **dnup**
*2025*
Flip cards to get the right numbers and ditch your cards.
![dnup](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_6d1a0932.jpg)

24. **Brass: Birmingham**
*2018*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_6de84926.jpg)

25. **Revenant**
*2026*
Evacuate a besieged starfleet, navigating external threats and internal allegiances.
![Revenant](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_f75eb4c4.jpg)
author: boardgamegeek.com

title: BoardGameGeek Bestsellers (Fallback to Plays)
content:
1. **Flip 7**
*18 months on the list*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?
![Flip 7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_ffd53553.jpg)

2. **Harmonies**
*26 months on the list*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_50b4dc9e.jpg)

3. **Castle Combo**
*21 months on the list*
Combine medieval villagers and castle dwellers to score points.
![Castle Combo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_041a8957.jpg)

4. **Ark Nova**
*54 months on the list*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_b9e8a2c6.jpg)

5. **Wingspan**
*90 months on the list*
Attract a beautiful and diverse collection of birds to your wildlife preserve.
![Wingspan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_6daeedfa.jpg)

6. **Azul**
*104 months on the list*
Artfully embellish the walls of your palace by drafting the most beautiful tiles.
![Azul](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_40a31529.png)

7. **Bomb Busters**
*14 months on the list*
Players defuse bombs by deducing and cutting unseen wires of different values.
![Bomb Busters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_75e286a7.png)

8. **Terraforming Mars**
*117 months on the list*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.
![Terraforming Mars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_cc089710.jpg)

9. **Sea Salt & Paper**
*36 months on the list*
A few delicate Origami-style illustrations and a whole marine universe comes to life!
![Sea Salt & Paper](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_e8958acd.jpg)

10. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*43 months on the list*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_e9cb5fa7.jpg)

11. **Faraway**
*26 months on the list*
Explore a mysterious land and fulfill quests on your way back.
![Faraway](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_800f6592.png)

12. **Forest Shuffle**
*33 months on the list*
Curate a diverse ecology with strategic flora and fauna, winter is coming!
![Forest Shuffle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_7dc2c705.jpg)

13. **Cascadia**
*59 months on the list*
Create the most harmonious ecosystem as you puzzle together habitats and wildlife.
![Cascadia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_a0ed6820.jpg)

14. **dnup**
*1 months on the list*
Flip cards to get the right numbers and ditch your cards.
![dnup](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_d91280fe.jpg)

15. **Sky Team**
*33 months on the list*
Work together silently to land a plane under increasingly challenging circumstances.
![Sky Team](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_27e480f2.jpg)

16. **Moon Colony Bloodbath**
*2 months on the list*
Whatever can go wrong will go wrong. Players compete to keep their colonists alive.
![Moon Colony Bloodbath](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_9969d51e.jpg)

17. **Hot Streak**
*5 months on the list*
Which mascot will cross the finish line first? Who will be DQ'd?
![Hot Streak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_3c963caf.jpg)

18. **The Gang**
*12 months on the list*
Bet together the order of your hands in Texas Hold'em Poker to win together.
![The Gang](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_84120557.jpg)

19. **Magical Athlete**
*5 months on the list*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_8571cea1.png)

20. **Lost Ruins of Arnak**
*66 months on the list*
Explore an island to find resources and discover the lost ruins of Arnak.
![Lost Ruins of Arnak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_8f070a6c.jpg)

21. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*19 months on the list*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_c5db6be8.jpg)

22. **Wondrous Creatures**
*1 months on the list*
Build the best reserve in the world for 100+ fantastic creatures!
![Wondrous Creatures](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_cd5be78d.jpg)

23. **Carcassonne**
*276 months on the list*
Shape the medieval French landscape, claiming cities, monasteries, roads, and farms.
![Carcassonne](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_1f1ca1d8.jpg)

24. **The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game**
*12 months on the list*
Travel from the Shire and overcome every obstacle as a team.
![The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_e1809965.jpg)

25. **SCOUT**
*43 months on the list*
Poach your opponents' artists and outdo each other's circus shows.
![SCOUT](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-20/toplist/bgg_5f48e404.png)
